name: Topgolf Swing Suite at Chicago Athletic Association
about: The Topgolf Swing Suite at Chicago Athletic Association is located on the ground floor of the historic hotel. It features two advanced indoor golf and interactive gaming simulator bays that offer virtual golf experiences and more to hotel guests and locals. Each bay accommodates up to 8 people for a maximum of 4 hours, with food and beverage service operated by Boka Restaurant Group. The venue is available for rent for business and social gatherings, including birthday and bachelor parties, team-building events, and corporate meetings.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced indoor golf and interactive gaming simulator bays
Accommodates up to 8 people per bay
Available for both business and social events

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The website does not specify whether clubs are provided or if you need to bring your own.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Food and beverage service is operated by Boka Restaurant Group, so outside food and drinks are likely not permitted.

faq.answer: The website does not provide an estimated time for playing 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: The venue accommodates up to 8 people per bay and is available for birthday parties, suggesting it is kid-friendly.
